title: festuca panciciana
intro: Festuca panciciana, also known as Pancic's fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Festuca panciciana is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Festuca panciciana are typically made from its leaves and stems, which can be infused in hot water to create a tea or decoction, or dried and processed into a powder for later use.
